content.json:
# Windows Firewall — Blocked Packets (EventID 5152)
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1562.004 Impair Defenses · T1046 Network Service Discovery (scan signal)
**Theme:** Windows Firewall deny parsing · **Data source:** `SecurityEvent` (EventID 5152 — WFP blocked a packet).

Parses 5152 packet drops by protocol/port, over time, by filter origin, and flags repeated-block source IPs (port-scan signal).

> The 'scan' threshold (> 100 blocks / source) is a tunable starting point.

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5152 | extend Proto=tostring(EventData.Protocol), DstPort=tostring(EventData.DestPort) | summarize Drops=count() by Proto, DstPort | top 100 by Drops desc
content.title: Blocked packets by protocol & destination port

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5152 | summarize Drops=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart
content.title: Packet blocks over time

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5152 | extend FilterId=tostring(EventData.FilterRTID) | summarize Drops=count() by FilterId, Computer | top 50 by Drops desc
content.title: Top filter origins (FilterRTID)

content.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 5152 | extend SrcAddr=tostring(EventData.SourceAddress) | summarize Drops=count(), Ports=dcount(tostring(EventData.DestPort)) by SrcAddr | where Drops > 100 | sort by Ports desc
content.title: Repeated-block source IPs (scan signal)
